description: India Book, III,8: Letter from Yosef b. Avraham to Avraham Ibn Yiju. The whereabouts of Yosef and Ibn Yiju are unclear. Goitein thought that Ibn Yiju was in Mangalore while Yosef was somewhere in India. Friedman suggests that Yosef was in Mangalore and Ibn Yiju was somewhere in Yemen. Friedman dates the letter to 1140–44. The letter contains details of their various business dealings.
